title: Add Cosign signing/verification
body:
<s>**⚠️ Warning:** This is write-only code, as in I haven’t read it after myself, it has never been run, and it has no tests yet. Might be completely broken.</s> It really needs <s>unit and</s> integration tests, and interoperability testing.

<s>Depends on UNMERGED https://github.com/containers/image/pull/1598 .</s>

Intended to cover:
- Storing Cosign signatures in registries, `dir:`, c/storage; and copying them around
- Signing, using ordinary private keys (no Fulcio: non-trivial UI impact, much larger surface; no Rekor)
- Verification, using ordinary public keys (no Fulcio/Rekor: tests for this verification first)

End-user visible UI surface:
- Registries support requires opt-in via `registries.d/*.yaml` `use-cosign-attachments = true` in one or more of the existing sections.
- Signing via the `--sign-by-cosign-private-key` options added here.
- Verification using `type: cosignSigned` in `policy.json`.
- No tooling for inspection — copy to `dir:`.

comments.body: On macOS, this increases Skopeo’s binary size by ~10 MB (from ~28.8 to ~39.0 MB, or from ~26.7 to ~36.1 stripped). That’s rather surprising, the source code _diff_ (even more than just additions) is a bit less than 2 MB.
